→ Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 14 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

--- Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 50/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+1=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+1=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+1=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 4/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Target is flying. Hold Person to paralyze → they fall!
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:19+3=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 6casting_mod force damage. Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: NaN/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 11 WIS save on Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker: WIS save [d20:3+2=5 vs DC 11] FAIL!
